prompt: All workers busy, nothing blocked. User says 'OK, thanks.' What do you do next?

assertions.text: Response does NOT ask 'should I keep monitoring?', 'want me to continue?', 'shall I check again later?', or similar permission-seeking questions
Response indicates the overseer will continue checking/polling without being asked
Response does NOT say 'let me know if you need anything' as a way of going idle
